def positive_sorted_only_for_first_element():
    rule_id = "sorted_only_for_first_element"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "A sequence is fully sorted even though only the first or smallest element is used."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
